messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
what is vrs in video settings of metro exodus

In the video settings of Metro Exodus, "VRS" stands for Variable Rate Shading. This feature allows the game to dynamically adjust the shading rate for different parts of the screen, focusing more processing power on areas where it is most needed, while reducing the shading rate in less critical areas. This can help improve performance in the game by optimizing the workload on the GPU.
